title: Change of Things
description: A ambitious Minecraft mod that plans on adding much to the base game and my own progression paths.
body:
# The Change Of Things
A ambitious minecraft mod adding many things that I want and thought would be cool.
## Current content
- A new ore with unique properties
- Adds a few new crafts to fill gaps in vanila
- New uses for copper in it's own industral progression path
- Explosive reactors
- A new material mixing oil and oobleck and has more realistic flow physics
- A new secret dimention below the bedrock
- Some interesting new toolsets
- Lots of gadgets and random things of questionable usefulness
- Ways to make blackstone and polished basalt renewable
- Pipebombs
- Powerful Endgame Items using powers outside your control
- Copper + Netherite together
- New decoration blocks
- New redstone components
- Hammers
- A revolver
- A lot more
## Will I update this past 1.20.1 or to another mod loader
Not impossible but unlikely.
## Why do the new copper blocks look like that?
I use the old copper color palette that the create mod used before 6.0 and I refuse to make it look consistant with vanila copper because it just looks better personaly.
## How do I craft some things?
~~JEI compatibilty is not fully implemented yet with the new crafting blocks so with some items you may need to experiment a little to figure out how to craft them.~~ Fixed as of 2.0.1 and Im working on even more JEI functionality.
## Suggestions for new stuff?
I kinda add anything on my mind so suggestions are taken often. Join the discord if you want to suggest something.
## Is this trying to be vanila+
Kinda? Depends on how you use it
## Is stuff in this mod a clear mindustry reference
Yes, and it will only get worse
## How do I get to this new dimention 
<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>
The dimention is currently very work in progress so i'm not really going to say. If you want to see my unfinished stuff you have to search for it (;
</details>
